title: The New Industrial Revolution: Bio x AI
body: By Vijay Pande
Analysis of AI's transformative impact on biology and healthcare

title: Agenda
body: AI industrialization of biology and healthcare
Comparison to post-WWII industrial revolution waves
Emergence of Bio GAFA platform companies
Transformation of drug discovery and diagnostics
Biology's evolution from empirical science to engineered discipline

title: The Core Transformation
body: AI will industrialize biology and healthcare
Expensive, labor-intensive services will transform into scalable compute
This shift represents the next industrial revolution

title: Historical Context
body: The transformation is comparable to post-WWII innovation waves
Post-WWII period saw major industrial revolution developments
Current Bio x AI shift follows similar revolutionary pattern

title: From Services to Compute
body: Healthcare currently operates as expensive, labor-intensive services
AI enables conversion to scalable computational processes
Scalability fundamentally changes economics of biology and medicine

title: The Bio GAFA Vision
body: The shift enables emergence of Bio GAFA companies
These companies could reshape entire biological and healthcare sectors
Platform models similar to tech giants will emerge in biology

title: Drug Discovery Transformation
body: AI will fundamentally reshape drug discovery processes
Full-stack approaches will replace traditional methods
Platform models enable systematic drug development at scale

title: Diagnostics Revolution
body: Diagnostics will be transformed through AI integration
Computational approaches replace labor-intensive testing
Scalable diagnostic platforms emerge from Bio x AI convergence

title: Care Delivery Innovation
body: Care delivery models will be reshaped by AI platforms
Full-stack approaches integrate across care continuum
Platform companies can verticalize healthcare delivery

title: Full-Stack Platform Approach
body: Bio GAFA companies will adopt full-stack approaches
Platform models enable control across entire value chain
Integration from discovery through delivery creates competitive advantage

title: From Empirical to Engineered
body: Biology historically operated as empirical science
AI enables transition to engineered discipline
Predictable, designable biological systems replace trial-and-error

title: The Industrialization Process
body: Industrialization means applying systematic, scalable methods to biology
Compute replaces manual labor and empirical observation
Reproducible, automated processes become standard in biological research

title: Revolutionary Impact Scale
body: Vijay Pande frames this as the next industrial revolution
Impact comparable to major historical economic transformations
Biology and healthcare will undergo fundamental structural change

title: Platform Economics
body: Platform models change economics of biological innovation
Scalable compute creates winner-take-most dynamics
Bio GAFA companies leverage network effects and data advantages

title: Outlook: The Bio x AI Future
body: AI-driven industrialization will transform biology into scalable compute discipline
Platform Bio GAFA companies will emerge across drug discovery, diagnostics, and care delivery
Biology evolves from empirical science to engineered industrial practice
